title: AI 10x'd My Productivity. I Became a Model Workhorse. I Didn't Get Promoted.
summary: AI made me a top performer. I was denied promotion twice. Speed makes bosses treat you as a hand, not a brain. The best AI users paradoxically become the most replaceable. The fix: design the incentive structure.
content: AI made me a top performer. I was denied promotion twice. Speed makes bosses treat you as a hand, not a brain. The best AI users paradoxically become the most replaceable. The fix: design the incentive structure.
